nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.name: WordPress Upload and Execute
nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.attack_vector: Upload a malicious PHP file to the WordPress upload directory and execute it using the uploaded file's URL

nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.name: WordPress oEmbed SSRF
nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.attack_vector: Exploit the oEmbed API to perform a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attack and potentially access internal services

nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.name: WordPress File Upload and Directory Traversal
nisci.gov.vn_-854254645060756471.attack_vector: Upload a malicious file to the WordPress upload directory and use directory traversal to execute the file
